rows.Company: Γ. ΠΑΝΑΓΙΩΤΟΠΟΥΛΟΣ - Ι. ΜΠΑΚΑΤΣΙΑΣ Ο.Ε. ΙΧΘΥΟΚΑΛΛΙΕΡΓΕΙΑ (G. Panagiotopoulos - I. Bakatsias General Partnership / Aquaculture)
rows.Product: Φιλέτο καπνιστής μαριναρισμένης πέστροφας (Smoked marinated trout fillet) — commercial name "FRÉSKOS, με λάδι, λεμόνι και πολύχρωμο πιπέρι, με φυσικό κάπνισμα ξύλου οξιάς, πλούσιο σε Ω3" (with oil, lemon, multi-coloured pepper, naturally smoked with beech wood, rich in Ω3). Production date 2026-02-03; use-by date 2026-09-01. Manufactured and packaged in Greece at 13ο χλμ. Καρπενησίου-Προυσού, Καρπενήσι 36100 (13th km Karpenisi-Prousos road, Karpenisi).
rows.Reason: EFET Regional Directorate of Thessaly conducted sampling under the 2026 Official Microbiological Criteria for Food Safety Monitoring Programme. Sample analyzed at the Thessaloniki Food Testing & Research Laboratory (Δ/νση Εργαστηριακών Δομών του ΕΦΕΤ). Listeria monocytogenes detected. EFET ordered immediate recall of the entire batch from market.
rows.Notes: EFET press release item 5396. RTE smoked/marinated fish — high-severity matrix for Listeria monocytogenes (no kill step before consumption; risk to pregnant women, immunocompromised, elderly). Manual operator add 2026-06-12 — EFET site returns HTTP 409 to automated fetches (recurring scraper gap). Recall verified via multiple Greek news outlets (lifo.gr, iatropedia.gr, enikos.gr, alfavita.gr, pronews.gr, therapeftis.eu, emakedonia.gr, news.gr, thetoc.gr) all reporting around 2026-06-10. Second EFET item this month (previous: item 5393 Barba Stathis Maroulenia salad / Listeria, 2026-06-02). Aquaculture-origin trout (Καρπενήσι, Thessaly region).

rows.Product: Milk Chocolate Spread — 220 g, UPC 6 28347 31004 2, Code 4-281-25 BB 4/27. Category: Candy, confectionary, snacks and sweeteners.
rows.Reason: CFIA recall notice — product recalled due to presence of pieces of glass. Recall initiation date 2026-06-03; CFIA public notice published 2026-06-09. Identification number RA-82183, CFIA ID 17394.
rows.Notes: CFIA Notification type recall. Foreign material (physical hazard — pieces of glass) — in scope for AFTS surveillance per scope rules. Distribution: British Columbia, New Brunswick, Ontario, Quebec, AND online sales (multi-province + e-commerce). CFIA classified Class 2 (probable but not severe health hazard); Tier-1 assigned per AFTS convention for glass/foreign material with laceration/choking risk. Recall date 2026-06-03 (recall initiation); Original published date 2026-06-09 (used as Date per AFTS first-published convention for CFIA). Manual operator add 2026-06-10.

rows.Product: Soft Ricotta/Requeson Cheese — 10 oz, 12 oz, 14 oz clamshell containers (plant number 24-128); ALSO 2-gallon and 5-gallon bulk buckets supplied to repackagers. Bulk product was repackaged under additional brand names including KESSO, QUESOS LA RICURA, IZALCO, DE MI PUEBLO, RIO LINDO.
rows.Reason: Voluntary recall after Maryland Department of Health (MDH) notified Clover Hill Dairy of potential public food health risk. FDA, MDH and Clover Hill Dairy continue investigations. Eight (8) Listeria infections linked to product per FDA/MDH cooperation. Clover Hill Dairy ceased production and distribution of ALL cheese products. Distributed 2026-05-04 → 2026-05-30 in NC, NY, VA, MD, NJ, DC via bulk distributors, retail stores, and directly to consumers.
rows.Notes: PRIMARY SOURCE / ROOT-CAUSE FIRM of the multi-state Clover Hill Dairy Listeria outbreak. Cross-references: CDC outbreak investigation page (existing) at cdc.gov/listeria/outbreaks/soft-cheese-06-26/investigation.html; CDC outbreak index at /index.html; FDA Outbreak Investigation page at fda.gov/food/outbreaks-foodborne-illness/outbreak-investigation-listeria-monocytogenes-soft-cheese-june-2026; downstream repacker FDA recall: Nelson & Isa Lacteos LLC at /nelson-isa-lacteos-llc-recalls-requeson-cheese-due-possible-health-risk (existing, NY only). Outbreak count: 8 cases as of 2026-06-09 per MDH/FDA. Eight bulk-repackaging brands likely have separate FDA pages: KESSO, QUESOS LA RICURA, IZALCO, DE MI PUEBLO, RIO LINDO + Nelson ISA Lacteos (already captured) — 5 additional firms may need monitoring as their FDA notices publish. Manual operator add 2026-06-10. fda_listing.py title-only filter would have missed (slug ends "possible-health-risk" — seventh confirmed instance of this scraper gap).
